network: Connection error. Check your internet and try again.
timeout: Request took too long. Try again.
unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.
conflict: There is a conflict with your data. Try again.
rate_limit: You have exceeded the request limit. Try again later.
maintenance: We are performing maintenance. Try later.
session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
permission_denied: You do not have permission to access this.
data_not_found: The requested data does not exist.
invalid_data: The data sent is not valid.
